ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Code of the unit (e.g., BS2051T) */,
  "unit_title" TEXT /* Title of the unit (e.g., Holy Land Study Tour) */,
  "unit_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit level (e.g., Undergraduate Level 2) */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline (e.g., BS) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points the unit is worth */,
  "proposing_college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college proposing the unit */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the unit (if applicable) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "prerequisite_description" TEXT /* Text field to describe the prerequisites in a more human-readable format */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the course is elective */,
  "max_enrollment" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll in the course */,
  "current_enrollment" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "waitlist_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can be on the waitlist */,
  "current_waitlist" INTEGER /* Current number of students on the waitlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_proposing_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposing_college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_unit_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_level_id") REFERENCES unit_levels ("unit_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_levels" (
  "unit_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit level */,
  "unit_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit level (e.g., Undergraduate Level 2) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the unit level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_code" TEXT /* Code of the discipline (e.g., BS) */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., Biblical Studies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "head_of_discipline" TEXT /* Name of the head of the discipline */,
  "head_of_discipline_email" TEXT /* Email of the head of the discipline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the discipline was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_code" TEXT /* Code of the college (e.g., TRI) */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college (e.g., Trinity College) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the college */,
  "dean_name" TEXT /* Name of the dean of the college */,
  "dean_email" TEXT /* Email of the dean of the college */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the college */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the college */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the college was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "student_number" TEXT /* Unique student number for identification */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Enrolled, Waitlisted) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance percentage of the student in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit for which the prerequisite is required */,
  "prerequisite_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prerequisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_instructors" (
  "unit_instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor assignment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit the instructor is assigned to */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the assignment (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_instructors_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_instructors_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Student, Instructor, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
